about.title: About VNP-WEB
about.subtitle: Discover the story, expertise, and values behind every web project.

who.title: Who I am
who.p1: My name is Guillaume Pruvost. Since 2014, I've been building web presences that last. VNP-WEB is not a factory agency, it's my freelance business. Located in Occitanie, France, I operate throughout France, Belgium, Switzerland, Luxembourg, Quebec, and all French and English-speaking areas worldwide.
who.p2: My background? A natural curiosity for search algorithms, backed by a dual degree in IT (BTS SIO) and management (BTS MUC). I see the web from two angles: pure tech and business strategy. This defines my current method.

what.title: What I actually do
what.seo: My core business is web copywriting, SEO, and GEO. Every day, I write and optimize content on complex topics to drive qualified traffic to your pages.
what.support: I also handle content optimization, web integration, and SMO (Social Media Optimization). I connect your entire digital ecosystem.
what.wp: I am a WordPress and website creation specialist. Redesigns, responsive design, mobile optimization: I master the technical chain. If your project needs a different platform, I adapt.
what.translation: Finally, I offer ENG-FR translation services. Perfect for businesses looking to conquer French or English markets with impactful text.

clients.title: Pricing and Workflow
clients.p1: I assist SMEs, artisans, and international players. Distance is never a barrier. Google Meet, Zoom, or async emails: I adapt to your tools.
clients.p2: What stands out in my collaborations? Responsiveness. I am available Monday to Saturday to handle your digital emergencies.
clients.p3: No rigid pricing grids. I offer a custom price tailored to your project. As a pure reference, my basic rate for web copywriting without integration is €0.04 per word.

why.title: Why VNP-WEB?
why.p1: VNP stands for Visibility, Notoriety, Popularity. A beautiful website is useless if it remains invisible. My job is to expose it to the right people.
why.p2: Artificial Intelligence is changing our industry. I focus on 100% human, authentic, and straightforward content. Adaptation is the key to web longevity.

intellectual.title: 3. Intellectual Property
intellectual.content1: All content on the VNP-WEB site (texts, images, graphics, logos, videos, etc.) is the exclusive property of VNP-WEB or its partners.
intellectual.content2: Any reproduction, distribution, modification, adaptation, retransmission or publication of these elements is strictly prohibited without the prior written consent of VNP-WEB.
intellectual.content3: Unauthorized use of the site or any of the elements it contains will be considered as constituting an infringement and prosecuted in accordance with the provisions of Articles L.335-2 and following of the Intellectual Property Code.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.content1: The VNP-WEB site uses cookies to improve the user experience and analyze site traffic.
cookies.content2: You can disable cookies at any time in your browser settings. However, some site features may no longer be available.
cookies.noteContent: This site only uses technical cookies necessary for the proper functioning of the site (local storage for language preferences).

liability.title: 6. Liability
liability.content1: VNP-WEB strives to ensure the accuracy and updating of the information published on this site, and reserves the right to correct the content at any time and without notice.
liability.content2: However, VNP-WEB cannot guarantee the exactness, precision, or completeness of the information made available on this site.
liability.content3: Consequently, VNP-WEB declines all responsibility for any imprecision, inaccuracy, or omission concerning information available on this site.

links.title: 7. Hypertext Links
links.content1: The VNP-WEB site may contain links to other websites. VNP-WEB has no means to control these sites and assumes no responsibility for their content.
links.content2: The creation of hypertext links to the VNP-WEB site requires prior written authorization.

law.title: 8. Applicable Law
law.content: These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute and in the absence of an amicable agreement, the dispute will be brought before the French courts in accordance with the rules of jurisdiction in force.

portfolio.title: My Portfolio & Case Studies
portfolio.subtitle: Discover how I guide my clients from obscurity to notoriety.

case1.title: Showcase Redesign for a Fitness Coach
case1.challenge: An aging site, not mobile-friendly, and invisible locally.
case1.solution: Complete WordPress redesign, modern design, and local SEO optimization.

case2.title: SEO Strategy for E-commerce
case2.challenge: Steady traffic decline following a Google penalty.
case2.solution: Full technical audit, toxic link cleanup, and internal linking overhaul.
case2.result: Returned to page 1 for 5 major keywords in 4 months.

case3.title: Tech Blog: Content Strategy
case3.challenge: Need to simplify complex concepts (AI, Data) to attract leads.
case3.solution: Writing 2 expert articles per month with long-tail optimization.
case3.result: +150% organic traffic generated on the blog in one year.
